synthesis_text: The most common symptoms of COVID-19 are fever, cough, fatigue, loss of smell (anosmia) and loss of taste (ageusia) [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001].

The most common COVID‑19 symptoms are fever or chills, dry cough, shortness of breath, congestion, runny nose or sore throat, loss of taste or smell, extreme fatigue, and headaches or muscle aches [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002].
The most common COVID-19 symptoms are fever, cough, and fatigue (tiredness) [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00001].
